title: Add /adv-triage command for backlog reconciliation and WSJF-prioritized roadmap regeneration

tasks.title: Write .opencode/command/adv-triage.md — full 6-phase command spec (~330 lines) with preflight, gather, match, user assignments, agent scoring, roadmap regen, and final report. Includes all 4 Tier B inline approval prompts, anti-patterns, and key tools table.
tasks.verification: Created .opencode/command/adv-triage.md (~330 lines). 6 phases: Preflight (gh auth + label check + project bootstrap), Gather (6 sources), Match (stable ref → Jaccard ≥0.6 → body excerpt), User Assignments (2 Tier B prompts for issues + Priority/Value), Agent Scoring (RROE/TC/Effort + WSJF with evidence trailers), Roadmap Regen (ROADMAP.md + local deprecation + atomic commit). 4 Tier B approval points, anti-patterns table, key tools table.

proposal.approval_evidence: Proposal approved by user. Implementation already complete — retroactively capturing through gate machine. Clarify warnings (scope, auth model) resolved in proposal update. Validation: 0 errors.

discovery.approval_evidence: Evidence gathered. Agreement documented with 7 objectives and 10 acceptance criteria matching problem statement. All scope boundaries confirmed. No gaps between proposal and implementation. Implementation already verified: 1864 tests pass, pnpm run check clean.

design.approval_evidence: Design recorded. Utility command composing existing tools — no new MCP tools, no Temporal changes, no gate ownership. 6-phase inline flow with 4 Tier B approval points. Match algorithm: stable ref → Jaccard ≥0.6 → body excerpt. WSJF: full SAFe with Fibonacci 1-13. Git safety: single-file stage, default branch only, dirty-tree abort. No architecture tradeoffs requiring user resolution — all decisions locked with user during initial design session.

planning.approval_evidence: 4 tasks created, all marked done with evidence. Task graph: (1) command spec file, (2) manifest + test, (3) docs (ADV_INSTRUCTIONS, README, SETUP), (4) verification. All implementation already complete — retroactive capture. 1864 tests pass, check clean.

execution.approval_evidence: All 4 tasks done. Implementation complete prior to gate capture. Evidence: 1864 tests pass, pnpm run check clean. Files changed: .opencode/command/adv-triage.md (created), plugin/src/manifest.ts (modified), plugin/src/manifest.test.ts (modified), ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md (modified), README.md (modified), SETUP.md (modified).

acceptance.approval_evidence:
Acceptance review. All 10 AC verified against implementation:

AC1 ✓ — 6 sources enumerated in Phase 1 (GH issues, project items, ADV changes, agenda, wisdom, notes, TODO/FIXME)
AC2 ✓ — Phase 0 bootstrap: project create, 7 custom fields, adv_project_metadata persistence
AC3 ✓ — Phase 3a Tier B prompt with kind_hint; source trailer in body; gh project item-add
AC4 ✓ — Phase 3b user-only (Priority/Value); Phase 4 agent autonomous (RROE/TC/Effort/WSJF); deferred items surface explicitly
AC5 ✓ — <!-- adv-triage:scoring v1 --> evidence trailer in issue body with rubric anchors
AC6 ✓ — Phase 5: ROADMAP.md with bugs by tier + features by WSJF + deprecation log + run summary
AC7 ✓ — Git safety: git add ROADMAP.md only, default branch check, dirty-tree abort, pull --rebase
AC8 ✓ — Per-source deprecation: TODO→see #N, agenda→complete, note→strikethrough, wisdom→annotate
AC9 ✓ — 4 Tier B prompts with "Reply EXACTLY one of:" anchor; no LLM fallback
AC10 ✓ — Phase 0 preflight: gh auth scope check, remote check, project creation check; refusal with exact refresh command

release.approval_evidence: User signed off. Release gate complete. Proceeding to archive. No spec deltas (utility command, no gate ownership, no capability changes). No conformance check needed (no specs affected). Build deferred to next session restart.
